0:["CWZ1DpWb8iXExH1EEsbJ0",[[["",{"children":["tools",{"children":["one-rep-max",{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",true],["",{"children":["tools",{"children":["one-rep-max",{"children":["__PAGE__",{},[["$L1",[["$","$L2",null,{}],["$","$L3",null,{"title":"One Rep Max: Find Your True Strength","children":["$","article",null,{"className":"prose prose-gray max-w-none","children":[["$","h2",null,{"children":"What is One Rep Max?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Your ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"One Repetition Maximum (1RM)"}]," is the maximum weight you can lift for a single repetition with proper form. It's the gold standard for measuring absolute strength."]}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"Why 1RM Matters"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Program design"}],": Most strength programs use percentages of 1RM"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Progress tracking"}],": Consistent metric across different rep ranges"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Safety"}],": Estimate max without risky maximal attempts"]}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"Popular Formulas"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Epley"}],": 1RM = weight × (1 + reps/30)"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Brzycki"}],": 1RM = weight ÷ (1.0278 - 0.0278 × reps)"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Lombardi"}],": 1RM = weight × reps^0.10"]}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"Accuracy by Rep Range"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"1-3 reps"}],": Very high accuracy (±2-3%)"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"4-6 reps"}],": High accuracy (±3-5%)"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"7-10 reps"}],": Moderate accuracy (±5-8%)"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"11+ reps"}],": Lower accuracy — not recommended"]}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"Training Percentages"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"95-100%"}],": 1-2 reps — Maximal strength"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"85-90%"}],": 3-5 reps — Heavy strength work"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"75-85%"}],": 6-8 reps — Strength-hypertrophy"]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"65-75%"}],": 8-12 reps — Hypertrophy"]}]]}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"Related
